translated: Greetings to Timothy and Erastus in Macedonia, and to all the brethren who are in Asia. The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all.

ref: As Stephen was being stoned to death, he called out, вАЬLord Jesus, please welcome me!вАЭ

ref: After they had come out of the water, the Lord's Spirit took Philip away. The official never saw him again, but he was very happy as he went on his way.

translated: When the world was young, when the earth was new, Apostle Paul, the servant of God, preached the gospel, and many people believed, and they were baptized and became one with the Lord.

ref: But that night an angel from the Lord opened the doors of the jail and led the apostles out. The angel said,

translated: If you are looking for a place to rest, the Apostles have prepared a place for you where you can find peace and rest your soul.

ref: The people kept thinking that Paul would either swell up or suddenly drop dead. They watched him for a long time, and when nothing happened to him, they changed their minds and said, вАЬThis man is a god.вАЭ
text: Banun…Ф eze…Цi as…Ы ebeћАyeke alo ebeglebe ad…Ф etsiћА odunu …Фl…Ы, p…Ф g…Ы bazaћГ epo kibeћА dzlolo…Ф p…Ы bag…Ы m…Ф as…Ы kibui nanaћА bh…Ыt…Ы y…Ы…Ы, betsyina bal…Ы ekpe…Цekpe…Цe m…Ы p…Ы ba…Ц…Ф as…Ы obudiћА an…Ф y…Ыenu.
translated: When the king is angry, he does not listen to anyone's advice, he only listens to his own thoughts, and he does not care about the people. He will punish them severely, and he will not show them mercy.

ref: We know that God is right to judge everyone who behaves in this way.
text: Bunyi otsi al…Ы …Фs…Ы, Owusoso Akaa y…Ыebhu kukulu n…ЫћА bag…Ы babh…Ыt…Ы ebui al…Ы n…Ыidi…Ы nu kibui g…Ыl…Ы …Ыl…Ы …ФzaћГk…Ф nuluћГ.
translated: When the sound of the horn was heard, Owusoso Akaa blew his own horn and responded to the call of the people, saying that he would come.

ref: After I started speaking, the Holy Spirit was given to them, just as the Spirit had been given to us at the beginning.

ref: and he gives us the power to live, to move, and to be who we are. вАЬWe are his children,вАЭ just as some of your poets have said.
